title: Crocodile’s Trap Is Interrupted
description: On pages 13–15, this part focuses on crocodile’s trap is interrupted, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Crocodile’s Trap Is Interrupted. Sanji’s hidden role as Mr. Prince disrupts Crocodile’s plan and creates the opening the crew needs to escape. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The rebel force is apparently mounting a full-scale attack on the capital!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: The rebellion's leader Kouza was shot!

dialogue.text: To think the King and the Royal Guards would dare to come out like that...

dialogue.text: Let us take the king's head!

summary: This part develops crocodile’s trap is interrupted and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
